calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"wc -l AGENTS.md .github/prompts/predict.md schemas/prediction.schema.json schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json schemas/agent_flags.schema.json && sed -n '1,360p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,300p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,300p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73281412 --event evt-petition-disposition","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg --files data/cases/scotus/73281412 | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"find data/cases/scotus/73281412 -maxdepth 5 -type d -print && find data/cases/scotus/73281412 -maxdepth 5 -type f -not -path '*/predictions/*' -print","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73281412/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml && sed -n '1,320p' data/cases/scotus/73281412/record/snapshots/2026-07-17.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' data/cases/scotus/73281412/record/documents/documents.json && wc -l -w -c data/cases/scotus/73281412/record/documents/*.txt && sed -n '1,220p' data/cases/scotus/73281412/record/documents/questions-presented.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73281412/record/context.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output)
const hits = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|court listener|fedcourts|search/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description)); text(hits);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n \"Modern discretionary|Segment base rate|relist|CVSG|Fifth|paid|Paid|salience\" metrics/statpack.md | head -100 && sed -n '1,260p' metrics/statpack.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '260,520p' metrics/statpack.md && rg -n 'salience' metrics/statpack.json | head","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq 'keys' metrics/statpack.json && jq '.. | objects | select(has(\"term\") and (.term == \"2025\"))' metrics/statpack.json | head -200","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq '.terms, (.sections | keys)' metrics/statpack.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq '.sections[] | {name, title, scope, buckets: (.buckets // .rows // empty)}' metrics/statpack.json | head -300","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --citation '441 U.S. 520' --era 2020s --limit 8 --corpus-backend ranged","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(JSON.stringify(r))

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"(\"suicide prevention\" OR \"suicide watch\") \"excessive in relation\" \"pretrial detainee\"",filed_before:"2026-07-17",num_results:10,fields:["id","absolute_url","caseName","citation","court_citation_string","dateFiled","snippet"]}); for (const c of (r?.content||[])) { if (c.type==="image") image(c); else if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); }

Wolfish\" excessive",filed_before:"2026-07-17",num_results:15,fields:["absolute_url","caseName","citation","court_citation_string","dateFiled","docketNumber","opinions"]}); for (const c of (r?.content||[])) { if (c.type==="image") image(c); else if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); }

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ && test ! -e data/cases/scotus/73281412/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T134540Z && echo output-path-clear","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":2000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"mkdir -p data/cases/scotus/73281412/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T134540Z","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":2000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"git status --short && find data/cases/scotus/73281412/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T134540Z -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f\\n' | sort && jq -e '.case_id == \"scotus/73281412\" and .event_id == \"evt-petition-disposition\" and .predictor_id == \"codex-baseline\" and .run_id == \"20260717T134540Z\" and .model == \"gpt-5.6-sol\"' data/cases/scotus/73281412/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260
